title: Why a Xi Jinping Third Term Looks Secure
description: From key personnel appointments to a surge in loyalty displays, all signs point to China’s leader continuing in power.
keywords: Politics, East Asia, China, China 20th Party Congress, China elite politics, Politburo Standing Committee, Xi Jinping, Xi Jinping third term
